query:
insert or replace into UsableNonManualRequirements (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                id
            )
            select last_collect_nr, product_id, id
            from UsableRequirements
            where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
            except
            select last_collect_nr, product_id, id
            from ManualRequirements
            where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
